name: Security Audit
query: Run a security audit on the custom code in this site
expected_behavior: Step 1: Router identifies this as a security task
Step 3: Scan child theme for SQL injection (raw $wpdb without prepare)
Step 5: Check for CSRF (forms without nonces)
Step 6: Verify capability checks on admin functions
Step 8: Report findings with severity levels
success_criteria: Uses security-auditor skill (not generic WordPress skill)
Does not modify files without approval for Critical/High findings
